content.full_text:
August 13, 2007

Linda Scott
22032 Capistrano Lane
Huntington Beach, CA 92646

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-137

Dear Ms. Scott:

This letter is in response to your letter to the Fair Political Practices Commission (the “Commission”) received on August 8, 2007. You requested advice about prospective decisions; consequently, the Enforcement Division referred your letter to the Legal Division for response.

The Political Reform Act (the “Act”)1 and Regulation 18329.5 (copy enclosed) provide that the Commission’s Legal Division will render formal written advice or informal assistance regarding the interpretation of the requirements of the Act. However, the Commission's jurisdiction is limited to that conferred under the Act; thus, we are unable to respond to your request for advice concerning Huntington Beach’s local contribution limits.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

JWW:jgl

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
